footer.description: Ho buloa ha ak'haonte ea banka bakeng sa ho buloa ha ak'haonte ea banka ho Sarajevo, Bosnia. Re haha software ea moetlo, tharollo ea AI / ML, meralo ea leru le lits'ebetso tsa boiketsetso.
footer.copyright: © {{year}} Horizon Tech. Litokelo tsohle li sirelelitsoe.

header.description: Ho tloha nts'etsopele ea software ea khoebo le bohlale ba khoebo bo tsamaisoang ke AI ho ea ho meralo ea motheo ea leru le tharollo ea IoT — re fana ka lits'ebeletso tse felletseng tsa theknoloji tse tsamaisang boqapi le ho potlakisa kholo.
header.trustedBy: Tšepahala ke lik'hamphani tse nahanang ka pele

caseStudies.title: Lithuto tsa morao-rao
caseStudies.description: Setšoantšo sa liphetho tsa phano ho fintech, tlhokomelo ea bophelo bo botle, thepa le mananeo a sechaba.

blog.title: Litaba tsa morao-rao ho tsoa ho blog ea rona
blog.description: Lintlha tse sebetsang tsa boenjiniere ho tsoa mosebetsing oa morao-rao oa AI, sethala le phano ea leru.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab
innovationLab.description: Hlahloba li-prototypes, liteko le merero e sebelisitsoeng ea R&D ho tsoa sehlopheng sa boenjiniere sa Horizon Tech.
